subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! In the days when the pillars of the Names trembled and were agitated through fear of the wicked, this Wronged One with the banner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی ایامیکه فرائص اسما از خشیت اشقیا مرتعد و مضطرب بود اینمظلوم با رایت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment
